title: Salty Crumbly Brazilian Hazelnut Crumble
description: A salty and crumbly dessert dish featuring shelled hazelnuts, perfect for a romantic date night or any evening.

ingredients.name: 1 cup shelled hazelnuts
ingredients.notes: Use roasted, skin-on nuts for extra flavor.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup unsweetened shredded coconut
ingredients.notes: Adds a nice crunch without too much sweetness.

ingredients.name: 3/4 cup almond meal (ground almonds)
ingredients.notes: Provides structure to the crumble and is higher in protein.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup brown sugar
ingredients.notes: Sweetens the crumble without overly sweetening it.

instructions: Combine hazelnuts, rolled oats, unsweetened shredded coconut, almond meal, melted butter, brown sugar, and vanilla extract in a large bowl.
Stir until all ingredients are well combined and evenly coated with the mixture.
Press the crumble mixture into an 8x8 inch baking dish lined with parchment paper for easy removal.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top. Watch closely to prevent burning.
Allow it to cool slightly before serving, as it will crisp up further upon cooling.
